zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach"於大約1270年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾時，他的父親Alexander Macdougall21歲，母親Julienne Comyn20歲。他和Maclachlan至少有1個女兒。他於1296年登記服兵役。他於1307年被列為sheriff of argyll (appointed by king edward) 。他去世於1316年在英國英格蘭肯特歐斯普林享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach"于大约1270年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾时，他的父亲Alexander Macdougall21岁，母亲Julienne Comyn20岁。他和Maclachlan至少有1个女儿。他于1296年登记服兵役。他于1307年被列为sheriff of argyll (appointed by king edward) 。他去世于1316年在英国英格兰肯特歐斯普林享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: MacDougall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDougall
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Dubhghaill, ‘son of Dubhghall’, a personal name composed of the elements dubh ‘black’ + gall ‘stranger’. This was originally a byname used to distinguish the darker-haired Danes from the fair-haired Norwegians. Compare McDowell and Doyle .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach" was born about 1270, in Argyll, Scotland, his father, Alexander Macdougall, was 21 and his mother, Julienne Comyn, was 20. He had at least 1 daughter with Maclachlan. He registered for military service in 1296. In 1307, at the age of 38, his occupation is listed as sheriff of argyll (appointed by king edward) . He died in 1316, in Ospringe, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach" est né environ 1270, à Argyll, Écosse, son père, Alexander Macdougall, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Julienne Comyn, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Maclachlan. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1296. En 1307, à l’âge de 38 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of argyll (appointed by king edward) . Il est décédé en 1316, à Ospringe, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach" um 1270 in Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander Macdougall 21 und seine Mutter Julienne Comyn 20. Er hatte mit Maclachlan mindestens 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1296 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1307, als er 38 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of argyll (appointed by king edward)  aufgeführt. Er starb 1316 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Ospringe, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach" è nato il circa 1270 nel Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, Alexander Macdougall, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Julienne Comyn, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Maclachlan. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1296. Nel 1307, all'età di 38 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of argyll (appointed by king edward) . Morì nel 1316, nel Ospringe, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach"が約1270年にスコットランドアルグイルで生まれた時，父Alexander Macdougallは21歳，母Julienne Comynは20歳であった。彼はMaclachlanとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1296年に兵役登録をした。1307年，38歳の時，職業はsheriff of argyll (appointed by king edward) と記録されている。彼は1316年にイギリスイギリスケントオスプリンッジで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach"(이)가 대략 1270년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Macdougall(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Julienne Comyn(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Maclachlan(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1296년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1307년, 38세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of argyll (appointed by king edward) 이었다. 그는 1316년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 오스플링에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach" nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander Macdougall, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Julienne Comyn, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Maclachlan. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1296. Em 1307, com 38 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of argyll (appointed by king edward) . Ele faleceu em 1316, em Ospringe, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach" родился около 1270 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Alexander Macdougall было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Julienne Comyn, 20. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Maclachlan. В 1296 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1307 году, в возрасте 38 лет, работал по профессии sheriff of argyll (appointed by king edward) . Он умер в 1316 г. в местности оспринг, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach" nació aproximadamente 1270, en Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Alexander Macdougall, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Julienne Comyn, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Maclachlan. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1296. En 1307, a la edad de 38 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of argyll (appointed by king edward) . Murió en 1316, en Ospringe, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 47 años.
